parsed.production_notes: The video combines a human-recorded actor with an AI-generated 3D robot avatar. The robot features synthetic text-to-speech audio and slightly stiff, automated lip-syncing, while the human actor has natural movement and audio.

characters.appearance: Young Indian woman in her 20s, medium build, wheatish complexion. She has dark brown hair tied back loosely with some strands framing her face. She has a small tattoo on her left forearm.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, expressive, eager to learn, and slightly sheepish when corrected.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot. The body is made of white and silver metallic panels with visible mechanical joints at the shoulders and elbows. The face is smooth and white with human-like eyes and lips, lacking a nose bridge or distinct human skin texture.
characters.demeanor: Neutral, helpful, and robotic, with subtle, programmed hand gestures.

scenes.setting: A typical Indian bedroom with a bed, floral bedsheet, wooden wardrobe, window, and ceiling fan. Daytime natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young Indian woman (Character A) is framed from the chest up, looking directly at the camera as if holding a phone for a selfie video. She is in a bedroom with a neatly made bed featuring a floral bedsheet, a wooden wardrobe, and a window letting in natural daylight. A ceiling fan is visible above. She makes expressive facial gestures, occasionally smiling or looking slightly embarrassed.

A humanoid robot (Character B) is framed from the chest up against a softly blurred background of an indoor cafe or living space with warm lighting and plants. The robot has a white and silver metallic body with visible joints. It looks directly forward, occasionally making small, precise hand gestures.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is formatted like a mobile video call. Character A occupies the full screen in the background, while Character B appears in a small rectangular inset in the top right corner. Text captions appear in the lower-middle section of the screen, and video call UI buttons (camera, end call, mute) are overlaid at the very bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: कल कहां गए थे। [Where did you go yesterday?]
Character A says: I went to माल yesterday. [I went to mall yesterday.]
Character B says: माल? pronunciation थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। It is Mall, I went to the mall yesterday. [Mall? The pronunciation got a little messed up. It is Mall, I went to the mall yesterday.]
Character B says: कल क्या खाया? [What did you eat yesterday?]
Character A says: I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat pizza ate.]
Character B says: पीजा? नहीं Pizza और बात कल की है इसलिए eat नहीं ate - I ate pizza. [Pija? No, Pizza. And we are talking about yesterday, so not eat, but ate - I ate pizza.]
Character B says: ट्रेन कहां से पकड़ते हो? [From where do you catch the train?]
Character A says: I pick train from railway ई-स्टेशन। [I pick train from railway e-station.]
Character B says: Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना... train उठाओगे? Catch मतलब पकड़ना और ई-स्टेशन नहीं Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift... will you lift the train? Catch means to catch, and not e-station, Station. I catch the train from the railway station.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
कल कहां गए थे। (Where did you go yesterday.)
I went to माल yesterday. (I went to mall yesterday.)
माल? (Mall?)
pronunciation थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। (pronunciation got a little messed up.)
It is Mall,
I went to the mall yesterday.
कल क्या खाया (What did you eat yesterday)
I eat पीजा खाया। (I eat pizza ate.)
पीजा? (Pija?)
नहीं Pizza और (No Pizza and)
बात कल की है इसलिए (we are talking about yesterday so)
eat नहीं ate - (not eat but ate -)
I ate pizza
ट्रेन कहां से पकड़ते हो? (From where do you catch the train?)
I pick train from railway ई-स्टेशन। (I pick train from railway e-station.)
Pick?
Pick मतलब उठाना... (Pick means to lift...)
train उठाओगे? (will you lift the train?)
Catch मतलब पकड़ना (Catch means to catch)
और ई-स्टेशन नहीं (and not e-station)
Station.
I catch the train from the railway station.

scenes.setting: A typical Indian bedroom with a bed, floral bedsheet, wooden wardrobe, window, and ceiling fan. Daytime natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A remains in the same bedroom setting, framed from the chest up. She continues to hold the camera, looking directly into the lens. Her expressions shift from slightly concerned to attentive as she listens.

Character B remains in the top right corner, framed from the chest up against the blurred warm indoor background. The robot maintains a steady gaze forward, with minor head movements and hand gestures.

scenes.visual_description: The video call layout continues with Character A in the background and Character B in the top right inset. Text captions continue to appear in the lower-middle area, and the video call UI buttons remain at the bottom. A brand logo briefly appears over Character A's chest.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ओह मेरा प्रोनन्सिएशन वीक है। [Oh, my pronunciation is weak.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं, AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [No problem, did you try the AI Teacher?]
Character A says: वो महंगा होगा ना? [It must be expensive, right?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल नहीं, Normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all, it is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 5 million people are practicing on MySivi.]
Character A says: लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]
Character B says: रोज सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे। [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will slowly become confident.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ओह मेरा प्रोनन्सिएशन वीक है। (Oh my pronunciation is weak.)
कोई बात नहीं, (No problem,)
AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? (did you try AI Teacher?)
वो महंगा होगा ना? (It must be expensive, right?)
बिल्कुल नहीं, (Not at all,)
Normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है। (It is 7 times cheaper than Normal English classes.)
इसलिए 50 लाख लोग (That's why 50 lakh people)
MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। (are practicing on MySivi.)
लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। (But I don't get time.)
रोज सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। (Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough.)
धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे। (You will slowly become confident.)

scenes.setting: A typical Indian bedroom with a bed, floral bedsheet, wooden wardrobe, window, and ceiling fan. Daytime natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is in the same bedroom, framed from the chest up. She looks excited and engaged, maintaining eye contact with the camera.
Character B is in the top right inset, framed from the chest up against the blurred indoor background. The robot continues its subtle, programmed movements while looking forward.

scenes.visual_description: The video call layout persists. Character A is the main background, and Character B is in the top right inset. Text captions are displayed in the lower-middle section, and the video call UI buttons are at the bottom. A brand logo appears again over Character A.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: वाओ! कैसे जॉइन करूं? [Wow! How do I join?]
Character B says: नीचे Install का button दबाओ, MySivi app install करो, sign up करो और practice शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में improvement दिखने लगेगा। Trial सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए है। अभी शुरू करो। [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. The trial is for just ₹1 for 3 days. Start now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
वाओ! कैसे जॉइन करूं? (Wow! How do I join?)
नीचे Install का button दबाओ, (Press the Install button below,)
MySivi app install करो, (install MySivi app,)
sign up करो और practice शुरू करो। (sign up and start practice.)
सिर्फ 15 दिनों में improvement दिखने लगेगा। (Improvement will start showing in just 15 days.)
Trial सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए है। (Trial is for just ₹1 for 3 days.)
अभी शुरू करो। (Start now.)
